debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
inst✝ : (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx) → SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
relIn : Set (StmtIn × WitIn)
relOut : Set (StmtOut × WitOut)
verifier : Verifier oSpec StmtIn StmtOut pSpec
stF :
  Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language relOut.language
    verifier
oneShotE : @Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn n pSpec
stmtIn : StmtIn
tr : Transcript (Fin.last n) pSpec
witOut : WitOut
h :
  ∃ x ∈ support (Verifier.run_simulate ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl verifier stmtIn tr),
    (x, witOut) ∈ relOut
this :
  ¬if n = 0 then
      (stmtIn,
          @Extractor.RoundByRound.extractOut ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec (fun x => WitIn)
            (Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec oneShotE) stmtIn tr
            witOut) ∈
        relIn
    else
      Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
          relOut.language verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∨
        (stmtIn, @oneShotE (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr default) ∈ relIn
⊢ ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
        relOut.language verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∧
    ∃ x ∈ support (Verifier.run_simulate ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl verifier stmtIn tr),
      ∃ x_1, (x, x_1) ∈ relOut

failed_attempts:
simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · push_neg at this
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨this.1, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all
      have hpSpec : pSpec = !p[] := by ext i <;> exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hpSpec
      have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hTr
      have := stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp only [hn, ↓reduceIte, not_or] at this
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨this.1, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · push_neg at this
      obtain ⟨hNotToFun, _⟩ := this
      obtain ⟨x, hSupp, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨hNotToFun, x, hSupp, witOut, hRelOut⟩

stop
    by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all
      have hpSpec : pSpec = !p[] := by ext i <;> exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hpSpec
      have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hTr
      have := stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      refine ⟨?_, x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
      push_neg at this
      exact (this hn).1

simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · push_neg at this
      obtain ⟨hNotToFun, _⟩ := this
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨hNotToFun, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨this.1, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

stop
    by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all
      have hpSpec : pSpec = !p[] := by ext i <;> exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hpSpec
      have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hTr
      have := stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      constructor
      · intro hContra
        apply this
        right
        left
        exact hContra
      · exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · push_neg at this
      obtain ⟨hStF, _⟩ := this
      obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨hStF, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all
      have hpSpec : pSpec = !p[] := by ext i <;> exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hpSpec
      have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hTr
      have := stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨hNotStF, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

obtain ⟨x, hx, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨this.1, x, hx, witOut, hRelOut⟩

stop
    by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn

    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      refine ⟨⟨fun hContra => ?_, x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩⟩
      simp only [hn, ↓reduceIte, not_or] at this
      exact this.1 hContra

by_cases hn : n = 0
        · subst hn
          have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
          subst hTr
          exact stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
        · simp only [hn, ↓reduceIte, not_or] at this
          exact this.1
      · exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

stop
    by_cases hn : n = 0
    · subst hn
      simp_all
      have hpSpec : pSpec = !p[] := by ext i <;> exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hpSpec
      have hTr : tr = default := by ext i; exact Fin.elim0 i
      subst hTr
      have := stF.toFun_empty stmtIn
      simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
    · simp_all
      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h
      constructor
      · intro hContra
        apply this
        left
        exact hContra
      · exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩

      obtain ⟨x, ⟨s, ⟨hs, h'⟩⟩, hRelOut⟩ := h

    · simp_all

      exact ⟨x, s, hs, h', witOut, hRelOut⟩
